title: Initiative Schema (per-file)
description: An initiative is the high-level organizing 'playlist' (the WHEN/grouping axis): it groups epics/lugs, carries priority + optional due date, and drives toward a culmination where Ozi celebrates with the user. Stored per-file mirroring lugs: WAI-Spoke/initiatives/bytype/initiative/{lifecycle_state}/{id}.json. The slug `id` is the canonical key (e.g. wheel-intelligence-layer); index.json is a generated read-model. Sessions advancing an initiative emit bolts that cross-link back to it (the journey/treasure map).

id.description: Canonical slug key, e.g. wheel-intelligence-layer (NOT initiative-{slug}-v{n})

status.description: Coarse open/closed flag retained for back-compat; lifecycle_state is authoritative

lifecycle_state.description: Authoritative lifecycle; also determines the storage folder. 'dormant' = asleep with a wake_on condition (sleep/wake feature).

wake_on.description: Wake condition for a dormant initiative. The steward wakes it when ANY set sub-condition fires.

at.description: Wake when now >= this ISO-8601 timestamp

event.description: Wake when this named harness event fires (e.g. epic_completed:epic-x, file_changed:path/glob)

commit_count.description: Wake when the repo commit count reaches this value (reuses the snooze_until_commit_count pattern)

reason.description: Why it was put to sleep / what to do on return

dormant_from.description: lifecycle_state the initiative held before sleeping; restored on wake

wake_reason.description: Set by the steward when an initiative is woken: which condition fired

current_position.description: Live 'where am I' snapshot for handoff — shareable with anyone reading the same files. Updated on save/switch.

by.description: session id or model that last wrote the position

owns.description: Glob patterns this initiative owns, so concurrent sessions/initiatives can divide a tree safely (e.g. WAI-Harness/spoke/advisors/expediter/**)

last_revisited_at.description: Last time the steward gave this initiative an intelligent return visit

revisit_cadence_days.description: How often the steward should revisit (default 7). Used to detect stall.

impact_rank.description: 1 = highest system impact; feeds backlog scoring multipliers

epics.description: Epic lug ids grouped under this initiative

task_lugs.description: Non-epic lug ids grouped under this initiative (optional)

focus_lock.description: When true, this initiative holds the fleet's focus until released

goals.description: One or many goals this initiative drives toward

priority.description: Optional priority (e.g. P1) used for sequencing

celebration_note.description: Written by Ozi at culmination, surfaced to the user
